questions.q: Which deployment strategy kills all running pod replicas first before initiating new ones?
questions.explanation: Recreate deletes all existing pods before starting new ones, which leads to temporary application downtime.

questions.q: What command rolls back a deployment to its previous revision?
questions.explanation: kubectl rollout undo deployment/<name> reverts a deployment to the previous revision. You can specify --to-revision=N for a specific version.
